\tzpentry{ID4927}{Vector Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4927 introduces Vector Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} d\mathbf{x} = \mathbf{A}dt + \mathbf{B}d\mathbf{W} \implies d\mathbf{W} \to 0 \end{equation}
